meta.title: Access Module Playground Blueprint
meta.author: Daniel-KM
meta.description: Test blueprint for the Access module that protects media files with access levels, embargo dates, and request-based authorization.

itemSets.title: Public Collection
itemSets.description: Collection with freely accessible resources for testing unrestricted access.

itemSets.title: Reserved Collection
itemSets.description: Collection with reserved resources requiring authentication or request-based access.

items.title: The Garden of Earthly Delights
items.description: Public domain painting used to test free access level. This item should be accessible by all visitors.
items.creator: Hieronymus Bosch

items.title: Thomas Carlyle Portrait
items.description: Oil painting used to test reserved access level. Visitors should see a locked placeholder until granted access.
items.creator: George Frederic Watts

items.title: Beethoven Symphony Sample
items.description: Audio sample used to test access control on non-image media files.
items.creator: Ludwig van Beethoven

site.title: Access Demo
site.summary: Demo site for testing the Access module with free and reserved resources, multiple user roles, and access request workflows.
